benefits.description: Nice energy boost at 8mg daily; feels best around 8mg

side_effects.description: Systemic fatigue hit at 5mg; backed down to 4mg, felt tired for a few days, then titrated up to 10mg before settling at 8mg

protocol_notes: Currently on 8mg daily SS-31. Previously explored up to 10mg. Below 8mg no longer feels effects. Also taking GHK-Cu occasionally for skin. Considering adding Mitopure (Urolithin A) and received Humanin to try. Focused primarily on mitochondrial peptides. Mentions human trials started at 10mg titrating up to 50mg over a year.
